judge_reason: Description A describes a page with typewritten text, a vertical crease, hole-punch marks, and a handwritten number, while Description B describes only two stamps and a typed paragraph, indicating the two descriptions are about different visual content.
original_image_tags: The page consists of white typewritten text on a solid black background. A faint vertical crease or line runs down the center of the page. The word "RESTRICTED" appears at the top and bottom in a distressed, stenciled-style font. Three hole-punch marks are visible on the left margin. The number "56" is handwritten in the bottom right corner.
gpt_mini_desc: *Image: A black-and-white scanned document page with typed report text, large “RESTRICTED” stamped at the top and bottom, and three binder hole punches along the left margin.*
